annotations.summary: Instant-mode counterpart to qrc-demo-range-max — 2-node DAG (instant query → threshold, no reduce node)
annotations.description:
Recording target for alert-whatif's instant-mode fidelity fixture. Captures real Grafana state transitions on a rule whose query node has `instant:true`, demonstrating that an instant rule produces the same lifecycle as `reducer: Last` over a staleness-sized window.

DAG:
  A — query node, instant=true, relativeTimeRange.from=10m (staleness window)
  B — expression node, type=threshold, gt 0.05 (source: true)

Lifecycle observed on 2026-05-17T07:33-07:43 UTC:
  Push starts at 07:33:23Z (sample T0)
  Pending entered at 07:36:30Z (T0+187s; rate had time to build past 0.05)
  Firing  entered at 07:38:30Z (Pending + for=2m)
  Push continued; rule remained Alerting → fixture captures "fires, never resolves".

Cleanup: `qrc-demo-instant` rule deleted from Grafana via DELETE /api/v1/provisioning/alert-rules/qrc-demo-instant immediately after this fixture was recorded.
